title: make curl error on non success status codes
body:
By default something like a 404 will not make curl exit with an error code. This is problematic for obvious reasons and instead of the file you want you may now have some 404 html text instead.

I noticed this in #28003 which well just build fine installers except the binary downloaded by the installer Makefile simply did not exist.

So to address that add --fail to most curl commands.
